user_prompt: Prepare the capacitor bank for purification
prayer:
Approach the capacitor bank with vials of sanctified electrolytes at hand.
Intone the ancient Rite of Purification to awaken its slumbering Machine Spirit.
Anoint each resonant coil of the capacitor bank, beseeching the Omnissiah to purge all corruptive discharges.
Drain the tainted fluxes whilst chanting binaric absolutions over the capacitor bank.
Verify the purification through auspex harmonics, praising the Machine Spirit's renewed purity.

user_prompt: Guide me through transuranic arquebus a preparation
prayer:
Kneel before the transuranic arquebus and murmur the Preparation Doxology.
Calibrate its rad-phasic chambers with sacred geomantic rods.
Invoke the Machine Spirit of the transuranic arquebus, aligning its warp-tainted conduits for the coming barrage.
Anoint the barrel assemblies in preparation, offering incense to the Omnissiah's glory.
Test-fire a null-round to affirm the transuranic arquebus's readiness.

user_prompt: Offer prayer for lightning claw a shutdown
prayer:
Circumambulate the lightning claw thrice, whispering the Shutdown Liturgy.
Deactivate its power feeds with reverent precision, soothing the raging Machine Spirit.
Sever the lightning claw's neural links whilst beseeching the Omnissiah for peaceful repose.
Seal its talons in stasis wax, intoning final benedictions upon the lightning claw.
Confirm dormancy through noospheric scans, honoring the Machine Spirit's obedience.

user_prompt: What's the prayer for power armour an initialization?

Stride forth sanctified, as the power armour's Machine Spirit merges with your will.

Present the mechadendrite mechritus before the servo-arm's manifold.

Anoint the servo-arm's gripping claws with blessed lubricants, summoning its Machine Spirit.
Imprint noospheric litanies upon the servo-arm for unerring precision.
Test its grasp in the Omnissiah's name, sealing the blessing eternal.

Beseech the Razorback's Machine Spirit to unify its fractured data-veins.
